requirement.description: The gateway shall forward the vehicle ignition status to the instrument cluster without modification.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

GW_IGNITION_STATUS_ID = 0x101
GW_IGNITION_STATUS_DLC = 8

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'vector'),
        channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 0),
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def collect_gw_messages(bus, duration_sec=1.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == GW_IGNITION_STATUS_ID:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

def get_ignition_state(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    return data_bytes[0] & 0x03

test_cases.title: Verify GW_IgnitionStatus message is transmitted
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; Monitor CAN ID 0x101
test_cases.expected_result: GW_IgnitionStatus message present on CAN bus

test_cases.title: Verify ignition OFF state is forwarded correctly
Verify ignition ACC state is forwarded correctly
Verify ignition ON state is forwarded correctly
Verify ignition START state is forwarded correctly
Verify ignition status is transmitted periodically
Verify IgnitionState remains constant if ignition does not change
Verify GW_IgnitionStatus DLC
Verify GW_IgnitionStatus stops after Gateway power OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ign_009_stop(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert not msgs_after

test_cases.title: Verify GW_IgnitionStatus resumes after restart
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ign_010_resume(can_bus):
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
